message:
The other day, I was in the kitchen trying to whip up a quick dinner when I glanced over at my smoke alarm. It was chirping a little too cheerfully for my taste! I realized it was time to change the batteries (again). As I stood on a chair, rummaging through my ‘emergency supplies’ drawer for the spare batteries, I chuckled at myself. I’ve been called ‘gloriously over-prepared’ by my friends, but honestly, I think it’s just smart! 

I mean, who doesn’t want a smoke alarm that actually works when you’re attempting that new pasta recipe? Plus, I’ve got an escape plan outlined on our fridge, which totally helps when the kids get involved in our fire drills—it’s like a fun game! 

Anyone else out there have an emergency plan or a quirky safety habit that’s kept you feeling calm? Let’s swap stories!
